                        bom_daata_color_specification_color_supplier_code_field = []
                        bom_data_color_specification_color_field = []
                        bom_data_color_specification_cad_image_name_field = []

                        colorway = detail.get("colorway", [])

                        for colorway_header in colorway_headers:
                            if colorway is not None and len(colorway):

                                    # logger.info(f"Extracting BOM Colorway c: {c}")
                                    if "name" in c and c["name"] == colorway_header:
                                        bom_data_color_field.append(c.get("color", ""))
                                        bom_daata_color_specification_color_supplier_code_field.append(c.get("color_specification_color_supplier_code", ""))
                                        bom_data_color_specification_color_field.append(c.get("color_specification_color_number", ""))
                                        bom_data_color_specification_cad_image_name_field.append(c.get("color_specification_cad_image_name", ""))
                                        bom_data_color_specification_description_field.append(c.get("color_specification_description", ""))
                                        break
                            else:

                                bom_daata_color_specification_color_supplier_code_field.append("")
                                bom_data_color_specification_color_field.append("")
                                bom_data_color_specification_cad_image_name_field.append("")
                                bom_data_color_specification_description_field.append("")
                            
                        # Add colorway fields to bom data

                            BOM_COLORS_COLOR_SPECIFICATION_COLOR_NUMBER : bom_data_color_specification_color_field,
                            BOM_COLORS_COLOR_SPECIFICATION_CAD_IMAGE_NAME : bom_data_color_specification_cad_image_name_field,
                            BOM_COLORS_COLOR_SPECIFICATION_DESCRIPTION : bom_data_color_specification_description_field
                        }
                        data.append(json_bom_data_colorway_fields)
                    item["Data"].append(data)

                seq += 1
                result.append(item)

        # colorway
        logger.info(f"Extracting Colorway")
        style_colorways = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.colorway
        if style_colorways:
            style_colorway_item = {
                "Seq": seq,
                "Type": "Colorway",
                "Header": {},
                "Name": "",
                "ColumnHeader": ["**ColorwayName", "**ColorwayCode", "**ColorwayImage", "Carry Over", "N / C / R - Colorway", "CAD Image Name", "Color Specification", "Garment Finish Comments", "Garment Chemical Finish", "Garment Mechanical Finish", "Garment Wash"],
                "Data": []
            }

            data_style_colorway = []
            for colorway in style_colorways:
                data_style_colorway.append([
                    colorway.get("name", ""), #**ColorwayName
                    colorway.get("color_no", ""), #**ColorwayCode
                    colorway.get("colorway_image", ""), #**ColorwayImage
                    colorway.get("carry_over", ""), #Carry Over
                    colorway.get("n_c_r_colorway", ""), #N / C / R - Colorway
                    colorway.get("cad_image_name", ""), #CAD Image Name
                    colorway.get("color_specification", ""), #Color Specification
                    colorway.get("garment_finish_comments", ""), #Garment Finish Comments
                    colorway.get("garment_chemical_finish", ""), #Garment Chemical Finish
                    colorway.get("garment_mechanical_finish", ""), #Garment Mechanical Finish
                    colorway.get("garment_wash", "") #Garment Wash
                ])
            style_colorway_item["Data"] = data_style_colorway
            result.append(style_colorway_item)
            seq += 1

        #SKU info
        skus_info = None
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.custom_fields:
            skus_info = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.custom_fields.get("skus", None)
        if skus_info:
            logger.info(f"Extracting SKU Info")
            sku_column_header = [
                "PLM Item SKU",
                "Size Extension",
                "RMS Legacy Style",
                "Original Sku Merch Style Name - 25"
            ]

            data_skus = []
            for sku in skus_info:
                data_skus.append([
                    sku.get("plmItemSku", ""), #PLM Item SKU
                    sku.get("sizeExtension", ""), #Size Extension
                    sku.get("rmsLegacyStyle", ""), #RMS Legacy Style
                    sku.get("originalSkuMerchStyleName25", "") #Original Sku Merch Style Name - 25
                ])

            sku_item = {
                "Seq": seq,
                "Type": "SKU",
                "Header": {},
                "Name": "",
                "ColumnHeader": sku_column_header,
                "Data": data_skus
            }

            result.append(sku_item)

            seq += 1

        # legacy style no
        logger.info(f"Extracting Legacy Style No")
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.legacy_style_no:
            item = {
                "Seq": seq,
                "Type": "Misc",
                "Header": {},
                "Name": "",
                "ColumnHeader": ["LegacyStyle"],
                "Data": [[customer_techpack_style_log_instance.legacy_style_no]]
            }

            result.append(item)
        logger.info(f"End extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema")
        return result

    def extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema(self, customer_techpack_style_log_instance):
        logger.info("Start extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema")
        result = []
        logger.info(f"Extracting POM")
        seq = 1
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.pom_unified:
            poms = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.pom_unified
            for pom in poms:
                header = pom['header']
                item = {
                    "Seq": seq,
                    "Type": "POM",
                    "Name": "",
                    "Header": {
                        "**ToleranceModel": header.get('tolerance_model', None),
                        "**PomDescription": header.get('pom_description', None),
                        "**GradingModel": header.get('grading_model', None),
                        "**GradingMethod": header.get('grading_method', None),
                        "**GradingUom": header.get('grading_uom', None),
                        "**BaseSize": header.get('base_size', None),
                        "**SizeRange": header.get('size_range', None)
                    },
                    "ColumnHeader": pom.get('column_header', None),
                    "ColumnMeasurementData": pom.get('column_measurement_data', None),
                    "ColumnGradingData": pom.get('column_grading_data', None)
                }
                result.append(item)
                seq = seq + 1
        # bom unified
        logger.info(f"Extracting BOM")
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.bom_unified:
            boms = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.bom_unified
            for bom in boms:
                column_header = [
                    "**BomHeader",
                    "**MaterialCategory",
                    "**MaterialCode",
                    "**MaterialType",
                    "**MaterialDescription",
                    "**Quantity",
                    "**MaterialContent",
                    "**MaterialConstruction",
                    "**MaterialCuttableWidth",
                    "**Placement",
                    "**Size",
                    "**RefNo",
                    "**Section",
                    "**InternalName",
                    "**SupplierName",
                    "**SupplierCop",
                    "**SupplierRefNo",
                    "**MainMaterial",
                    "**UOM",
                    "**CountryOfOrigin",
                    "**CostFob",
                    "**CostCif",
                    "**WeightBeforeWash",
                    "**WeightAfterWash",
                    "**WeightUOM",
                    "**Comments"
                ]
                # Define an array objects, each object has 2 properties to identify custom fields is available in bom unified or not
                bom_custom_fields = []
                colorway_headers = []
                details = bom.get("details", [])
                if details is None:
                    details = []
                # custom field
                for detail in details:
                    # Component
                    component = detail.get("component", "")
                    if component is not None and component != "" and "Component" not in bom_custom_fields:
                        bom_custom_fields.append("Component")
                    
                    #Finished Construction
                    finished_construction = detail.get("finished_construction", "")
                    if finished_construction is not None and finished_construction != "" and "FinishedConstruction" not in bom_custom_fields:
                        bom_custom_fields.append("FinishedConstruction")
                    
                    #Special Care/Other Notes
                    special_care_or_other_notes = detail.get("special_care_or_other_notes", "")
                    if special_care_or_other_notes is not None and special_care_or_other_notes != "" and "SpecialCareOrOtherNotes" not in bom_custom_fields:
                        bom_custom_fields.append("SpecialCareOrOtherNotes")
                    
                    #Material Sub Type
                    material_sub_type = detail.get("material_sub_type", "")
                    if material_sub_type is not None and material_sub_type != "" and "material_sub_type" not in bom_custom_fields:
                        bom_custom_fields.append("material_sub_type")
                    
                    # status
                    status = detail.get("status", "")
                    if status is not None and status != "" and "status" not in bom_custom_fields:
                        bom_custom_fields.append("status")
                    
                    colorway = detail.get("colorway", [])
                    if colorway is not None and len(colorway):
                        for c in colorway:
                            if "name" in c and c["name"] not in colorway_headers:
                                colorway_headers.append(c["name"])
                
                if bom_custom_fields:
                    column_header.extend(bom_custom_fields)
                if colorway_headers:
                    # Add colorway headers to column header
                    json_colorway_headers = {
                        "Colorway" : colorway_headers
                    }
                    column_header.append(json_colorway_headers)

                item = {
                    "Seq": seq,
                    "Type": "BOM",
                    "Name": bom.get("part", ""),
                    "Header": {},
                    "ColumnHeader": column_header,
                    "Data": []
                }

                for detail in details:
                    data = [bom.get("part", "")]
                    compositions = []
                    origin_ctr = ""
                    bom_compositions = detail.get("composition", [])
                    if bom_compositions:
                        for composition in bom_compositions:
                            percentage = composition.get("fiber_pecentage", "")
                            content = composition.get("fiber_content", "")
                            if percentage and content:
                                compositions.append(f"{percentage}% {content}")

                        origin_ctr = bom_compositions[0].get("fiber_coo", "")
                    
                    material_type_from_material_name = detail.get("material_name", "")
                    bom_size = detail.get("size", "")
                    data.extend([
                        detail.get("bom_detail_name", ""),
                        detail.get("material_no", ""),
                        material_type_from_material_name, #**MaterialType <-- JSON "material_name"
                        material_type_from_material_name if not bom_size else bom_size + " " + material_type_from_material_name, #**MaterialDescription <-- Go to JSON Bill of Materials (BOM)"size" + " " + 'JSON "material_name"
                        detail.get("qty", ""),
                        " ".join(compositions),
                        "", # **MaterialConstruction
                        "", # **MaterialCuttableWidth
                        detail.get("placement", ""), # **Placement
                        bom_size, # **Size
                        "", # **RefNo
                        "", # **Section
                        detail.get("material_name", ""),
                        detail.get("mill_supplier", ""),
                        "", # **SupplierCop
                        detail.get("mil_suplier_article_no", ""), # **SupplierRefNo
                        detail.get("primary", ""), # **MainMaterial
                        "", # **UOM
                        origin_ctr,
                        "", # **CostFob
                        "", # **CostCif
                        detail.get("weight_before_wash", ""), # **WeightBeforeWash
                        detail.get("weight_after_wash", ""), # **WeightAfterWash
                        detail.get("weight_uom", ""), # **WeightUOM
                        "", # **Comments
                    ])

                    bom_data_custom_fields = []
                    if bom_custom_fields:
                        for custom_field in bom_custom_fields:
                            # Component
                            if custom_field == "Component":
                                bom_data_custom_fields.append(detail.get("component", ""))
                            elif custom_field == "FinishedConstruction":
                                bom_data_custom_fields.append(detail.get("finished_construction", ""))
                            elif custom_field == "SpecialCareOrOtherNotes":
                                bom_data_custom_fields.append(detail.get("special_care_or_other_notes", ""))
                            else:
                                bom_data_custom_fields.append(detail.get(custom_field, ""))
                        
                    data.extend(bom_data_custom_fields)

                    if colorway_headers:
                        bom_data_colorway_fields = []
                        colorway = detail.get("colorway", [])
                        for colorway_header in colorway_headers:
                            colorway_value = ""
                            if colorway is not None and len(colorway):
                                for c in colorway:
                                    if "name" in c and c["name"] == colorway_header:
                                        colorway_value = c.get("value", "")
                                        break
                            bom_data_colorway_fields.append(colorway_value)
                        # Add colorway fields to bom data
                        json_bom_data_colorway_fields = {
                            "Colorway" : bom_data_colorway_fields
                        }
                        data.append(json_bom_data_colorway_fields)
                    item["Data"].append(data)

                seq += 1
                result.append(item)

        # colorway
        logger.info(f"Extracting Colorway")
        style_colorways = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.colorway
        if style_colorways:
            style_colorway_item = {
                "Seq": seq,
                "Type": "Colorway",
                "Header": {},
                "Name": "",
                "ColumnHeader": ["**ColorwayName", "**ColorwayCode", "**ColorwayImage"],
                "Data": []
            }

            data_style_colorway = []
            for colorway in style_colorways:
                data_style_colorway.append([
                    colorway.get("name", ""),
                    colorway.get("colorway", ""),
                    None
                ])
            style_colorway_item["Data"] = data_style_colorway
            result.append(style_colorway_item)
            seq += 1

        # legacy style no
        logger.info(f"Extracting Legacy Style No")
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.legacy_style_no:
            item = {
                "Seq": seq,
                "Type": "Misc",
                "Header": {},
                "Name": "",
                "ColumnHeader": ["LegacyStyle"],
                "Data": [[customer_techpack_style_log_instance.legacy_style_no]]
            }

            result.append(item)
        logger.info(f"End extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema")
        return result

services/xts_transformation/oa_xts_trans.name: OaXtsTransformationService
services/xts_transformation/oa_xts_trans.source_code:
class OaXtsTransformationService:
    def __init__(self, current_user_session=None):
        self.current_user_session = current_user_session
    
    def transform_to_xts_schema_oa(self, customer_techpack_style_log_instance):
        logger.info("Start transform_to_xts_schema_oa")
        json_techpack_comparison_file = {
            "CONTAINER_NAME": "",
            "FILE_NAME": "",
            "STORAGE_NAME": ""
        }
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file and customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file.get("result", "") == "Success":
            json_techpack_comparison_file = {
                "CONTAINER_NAME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file.get("container_name", None),
                "FILE_NAME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file.get("file_name", None),
                "STORAGE_NAME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file.get("storage_name", None)
            }
        
        attchment_pdf_techpack_json = {
            "TECH_PACK_FILE_CONTAINER_NAME": AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_TECHPACK_STYLE,
            "TECH_PACK_FILE_FILE_NAME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.attchment_pdf_techpack,
            "TECH_PACK_FILE_STORAGE_NAME": AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT
        }
        if TECHPACK_SOURCE_NON_PLM == customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_source:
            attchment_pdf_techpack_json = {
                "TECH_PACK_FILE_CONTAINER_NAME": AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_TECHPACK_NONPLM,
                "TECH_PACK_FILE_FILE_NAME": f"{AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_TECHPACK_NONPLM_PROCESSED_PDF}{customer_techpack_style_log_instance.attchment_pdf_techpack}",
                "TECH_PACK_FILE_STORAGE_NAME": AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT
            }
        vendor = None
        # Department from customer_techpack_style_log_instance
        custom_field_department = ""
        custom_field_product_family = ""
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.custom_fields:
            custom_field_department = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.custom_fields.get("department", '')
            custom_field_product_family = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.custom_fields.get("product_family", '')
        xts_data_schema = None
        xts_data_schema = {
            "ACTION_CODE": "NEW_TECHPACK",
            "CUSTOMER": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_name,
            "DATE": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.timestamp_lf_captured,
            "DEPARTMENT": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_department,
            "PRODUCT_TYPE": "",
            "SEASON": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_season,
            "STYLE_DESCRIPTION": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_description,
            "STYLE_NO": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_no,
            "TECH_PACK_COMPARISON_FILE": json_techpack_comparison_file,
            "TECH_PACK_EXTRACTION": {
                "TechPackHeader": {
                    "**Customer": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_name,
                    "**StyleNo": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_no,
                    "**StyleDescription": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_description,
                    "**Season": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_season,
                    "**Status": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_techpack_status,
                    "**ProductFamily": custom_field_product_family,
                    "**ProductCategoryGroup": None,
                    "**ProductCategory": None,
                    "**ProductType": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_product_type,
                    "**RepeatOrderSeason": None,
                    "**NewCarryOverRepeated": None,
                    "**Division": None,
                    "**Department": custom_field_department,
                    "**ReferenceStyleNo": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.reference_style_no,
                    "**PrimaryMaterial": None,
                    "**Vendor": vendor,
                    "**InDC": None,
                    "**Fit": None,
                    "**Wash": None,
                    "**Color": None,
                    "**Size": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.size,
                    "**Brand": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_brand,
                    "RFQ Factory": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.custom_fields.get("rfq_factory", None) if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.custom_fields else None
                },
                "Table": self.extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema(customer_techpack_style_log_instance),
            },
            "TECH_PACK_DOWNLOAD_TIME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.timestamp_lf_captured,
            "TECH_PACK_FILE": attchment_pdf_techpack_json,
            "TECH_PACK_IMAGES": extract_images_ship_to_xts(customer_techpack_style_log_instance),
            "TECH_PACK_STATUS": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_techpack_status,
            "TP_MGMT_RECORD_ID": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.teckpack_style_log_id
        }

        logger.info("End transform_to_xts_schema_landsend")
        return xts_data_schema

    def extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema(self, customer_techpack_style_log_instance):
        logger.info("Start extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema")
        result = []
        # OA customer does not have POM
        logger.info(f"Extracting POM OA")
        seq = 1
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.pom_unified:
            poms = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.pom_unified
            for pom in poms:
                header = pom['header']
                item = {
                    "Seq": seq,
                    "Type": "POM",
                    "Name": "",
                    "Header": {
                        "**ToleranceModel": header.get('tolerance_model', None),
                        "**PomDescription": header.get('pom_description', None),
                        "**GradingModel": header.get('grading_model', None),
                        "**GradingMethod": header.get('grading_method', None),
                        "**GradingUom": header.get('grading_uom', None),
                        "**BaseSize": header.get('base_size', None),
                        "**SizeRange": header.get('size_range', None)
                    },
                    "ColumnHeader": pom.get('column_header', None),
                    "ColumnMeasurementData": pom.get('column_measurement_data', None),
                    "ColumnGradingData": pom.get('column_grading_data', None)
                }
                result.append(item)
                seq = seq + 1
        # bom unified
        logger.info(f"Extracting BOM of OA")
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.bom_unified:
            boms = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.bom_unified
            for bom in boms:
                column_header = [
                    "**BomHeader",
                    "**MaterialCategory",
                    "**MaterialCode",
                    "**MaterialType",
                    "**MaterialDescription",
                    "**Quantity",
                    "**MaterialContent",
                    "**MaterialConstruction",
                    "**MaterialCuttableWidth",
                    "**Placement",
                    "**Size",
                    "**RefNo",
                    "**Section",
                    "**InternalName",
                    "**SupplierName",
                    "**SupplierCop",
                    "**SupplierRefNo",
                    "**MainMaterial",
                    "**UOM",
                    "**CountryOfOrigin",
                    "**CostFob",
                    "**CostCif",
                    "**WeightBeforeWash",
                    "**WeightAfterWash",
                    "**WeightUOM",
                    "**Comments",
                ]
                
                # Define an array objects, each object has 2 properties to identify custom fields is available in bom unified or not
                bom_custom_fields = []
                colorway_headers = []
                details = bom.get("details", [])
                if details is None:
                    details = []
                # custom field
                for detail in details:
                    # colorway header
                    colorway = detail.get("colorway", [])
                    if colorway is not None and len(colorway):
                        for c in colorway:
                            if "name" in c and c["name"] not in colorway_headers:
                                colorway_headers.append(c["name"])
                
                column_header.extend(bom_custom_fields)

                if colorway_headers:
                    # Add colorway headers to column header
                    json_colorway_headers = {
                        "Colorway" : colorway_headers
                    }
                    column_header.append(json_colorway_headers)

                item = {
                    "Seq": seq,
                    "Type": "BOM",
                    "Name": bom.get("part", ""),
                    "Header": {},
                    "ColumnHeader": column_header,
                    "Data": []
                }

                for detail in details:
                    data = [bom.get("part", "")]

                    data.extend([
                        detail.get("bom_detail_name", ""), #**MaterialCategory
                        detail.get("material_no", ""), #**MaterialCode
                        detail.get("material_type", ""), #**MaterialType
                        detail.get("material_name", ""), #**MaterialDescription
                        detail.get("qty", ""), #**Quantity
                        detail.get("material_content", ""), #**MaterialContent
                        "", # **MaterialConstruction
                        detail.get("material_cuttable_width", ""), # **MaterialCuttableWidth
                        detail.get("placement", ""), #**Placement
                        detail.get("size", ""), #**Size
                        "", # **RefNo
                        "", # **Section
                        "", #**InternalName
                        detail.get("supplier_name", ""), #**SupplierName
                        "", # **SupplierCop
                        detail.get("mil_suplier_article_no", ""), # **SupplierRefNo
                        detail.get("primary", ""), # **MainMaterial
                        "", # **UOM
                        detail.get("fiber_coo", ""), #Country of Origin (fiber)
                        "", # **CostFob
                        "", # **CostCif
                        detail.get("weight_before_wash", ""), # **WeightBeforeWash = Requested Weight Oz per Yard
                        detail.get("weight_after_wash", ""), # **WeightAfterWash
                        detail.get("weight_uom", ""), # **WeightUOM
                        detail.get("comment", ""), # **Comments = comment
                    ])

                    bom_data_custom_fields = []
                    if bom_custom_fields:
                        for custom_field in bom_custom_fields:
                            bom_data_custom_fields.append(detail.get(custom_field, ""))
                        
                    data.extend(bom_data_custom_fields)

                    logger.info(f"Extracting BOM Custom Fields End")

                    if colorway_headers:
                        bom_data_colorway_fields = []
                        colorway = detail.get("colorway", [])
                        # logger.info(f"Extracting BOM Colorway Headers: {colorway_headers}")
                        # logger.info(f"Extracting BOM Colorway data: {colorway}")
                        for colorway_header in colorway_headers:
                            colorway_value = ""
                            if colorway is not None and len(colorway):
                                for c in colorway:
                                    # logger.info(f"Extracting BOM Colorway c: {c}")
                                    if "name" in c and c["name"] == colorway_header:
                                        colorway_value = c.get("value", "")
                                        # logger.info(f"Extracting BOM Colorway Value: {colorway_value}")
                                        break
                            bom_data_colorway_fields.append(colorway_value)
                        # Add colorway fields to bom data
                        json_bom_data_colorway_fields = {
                            "Colorway" : bom_data_colorway_fields
                        }
                        data.append(json_bom_data_colorway_fields)
                    item["Data"].append(data)

                seq += 1
                result.append(item)

        # colorway
        logger.info(f"Extracting Colorway")
        style_colorways = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.colorway
        if style_colorways:
            style_colorway_item = {
                "Seq": seq,
                "Type": "Colorway",
                "Header": {},
                "Name": "",
                "ColumnHeader": ["**ColorwayName", "**ColorwayCode", "**ColorwayImage", "Carry Over", "N / C / R - Colorway", "CAD Image Name", "Color Specification", "Garment Finish Comments", "Garment Chemical Finish", "Garment Mechanical Finish", "Garment Wash"],
                "Data": []
            }

            data_style_colorway = []
            for colorway in style_colorways:
                data_style_colorway.append([
                    colorway.get("name", ""), #**ColorwayName
                    colorway.get("color_no", ""), #**ColorwayCode
                    colorway.get("colorway_image", ""), #**ColorwayImage
                    colorway.get("carry_over", ""), #Carry Over
                    colorway.get("n_c_r_colorway", ""), #N / C / R - Colorway
                    colorway.get("cad_image_name", ""), #CAD Image Name
                    colorway.get("color_specification", ""), #Color Specification
                    colorway.get("garment_finish_comments", ""), #Garment Finish Comments
                    colorway.get("garment_chemical_finish", ""), #Garment Chemical Finish
                    colorway.get("garment_mechanical_finish", ""), #Garment Mechanical Finish
                    colorway.get("garment_wash", "") #Garment Wash
                ])
            style_colorway_item["Data"] = data_style_colorway
            result.append(style_colorway_item)
            seq += 1

        #SKU info
        skus_info = None
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.custom_fields:
            skus_info = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.custom_fields.get("skus", None)
        if skus_info:
            logger.info(f"Extracting SKU Info")
            sku_column_header = [
                "PLM Item SKU",
                "Size Extension",
                "RMS Legacy Style",
                "Original Sku Merch Style Name - 25"
            ]

            data_skus = []
            for sku in skus_info:
                data_skus.append([
                    sku.get("plmItemSku", ""), #PLM Item SKU
                    sku.get("sizeExtension", ""), #Size Extension
                    sku.get("rmsLegacyStyle", ""), #RMS Legacy Style
                    sku.get("originalSkuMerchStyleName25", "") #Original Sku Merch Style Name - 25
                ])

            sku_item = {
                "Seq": seq,
                "Type": "SKU",
                "Header": {},
                "Name": "",
                "ColumnHeader": sku_column_header,
                "Data": data_skus
            }

            result.append(sku_item)

            seq += 1

        # legacy style no
        logger.info(f"Extracting Legacy Style No")
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.legacy_style_no:
            item = {
                "Seq": seq,
                "Type": "Misc",
                "Header": {},
                "Name": "",
                "ColumnHeader": ["LegacyStyle"],
                "Data": [[customer_techpack_style_log_instance.legacy_style_no]]
            }

            result.append(item)
        logger.info(f"End extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema")
        return result

services/xts_transformation/oa_xts_trans.name: OaXtsTransformationService
services/xts_transformation/oa_xts_trans.source_code:
class OaXtsTransformationService:
    def __init__(self, current_user_session=None):
        self.current_user_session = current_user_session
    
    def transform_to_xts_schema_oa(self, customer_techpack_style_log_instance):
        logger.info("Start transform_to_xts_schema_oa")
        json_techpack_comparison_file = {
            "CONTAINER_NAME": "",
            "FILE_NAME": "",
            "STORAGE_NAME": ""
        }
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file and customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file.get("result", "") == "Success":
            json_techpack_comparison_file = {
                "CONTAINER_NAME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file.get("container_name", None),
                "FILE_NAME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file.get("file_name", None),
                "STORAGE_NAME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file.get("storage_name", None)
            }
        
        attchment_pdf_techpack_json = {
            "TECH_PACK_FILE_CONTAINER_NAME": AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_TECHPACK_STYLE,
            "TECH_PACK_FILE_FILE_NAME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.attchment_pdf_techpack,
            "TECH_PACK_FILE_STORAGE_NAME": AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT
        }
        if TECHPACK_SOURCE_NON_PLM == customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_source:
            attchment_pdf_techpack_json = {
                "TECH_PACK_FILE_CONTAINER_NAME": AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_TECHPACK_NONPLM,
                "TECH_PACK_FILE_FILE_NAME": f"{AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_TECHPACK_NONPLM_PROCESSED_PDF}{customer_techpack_style_log_instance.attchment_pdf_techpack}",
                "TECH_PACK_FILE_STORAGE_NAME": AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT
            }
        vendor = None
        bom_ai = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.bom_ai
        bom_ai_product = None
        techpack_status = None # bom_ai => product => product_status
        product_family = None # bom_ai => product => sbu
        department = ""
        factory = "" # bom_ai => product => factory
        product_category = "" # bom_ai => product => class
        size = None # bom_ai => product => size_definitions
        brand = None # bom_ai => product => brand
        sub_class = None # bom_ai => product => sub_class
        age = None # bom_ai => product => age
        gender = None # bom_ai => product => reportable_gender
        season_name = None # bom_ai => product => season_name
        if bom_ai:
            bom_ai_product = bom_ai.get("product", None)
        if bom_ai_product:
            techpack_status = bom_ai_product.get("product_status", None)
            product_family = bom_ai_product.get("sbu", None)
            vendor = bom_ai_product.get("parent_vendor", None)
            factory = bom_ai_product.get("factory", None)
            product_category = bom_ai_product.get("class", None)
            size = bom_ai_product.get("size_definitions", None)
            brand = bom_ai_product.get("brand", None)
            sub_class = bom_ai_product.get("sub_class", None)
            age = bom_ai_product.get("age", None)
            gender = bom_ai_product.get("reportable_gender", None)
            season_name = bom_ai_product.get("season_name", None)

        xts_data_schema = {
            "ACTION_CODE": "NEW_TECHPACK",
            "TP_MGMT_RECORD_ID": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.teckpack_style_log_id,
            "CUSTOMER": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_name,
            "STYLE_NO": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_no,
            "STYLE_DESCRIPTION": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_description,
            "DEPARTMENT": department,
            "SEASON": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_season,
            "PRODUCT_TYPE": "",
            "TECH_PACK_STATUS": techpack_status,
            "TECH_PACK_DOWNLOAD_TIME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.timestamp_lf_captured,
            "TECH_PACK_FILE": attchment_pdf_techpack_json,
            "TECH_PACK_COMPARISON_FILE": json_techpack_comparison_file,
            "TECH_PACK_IMAGES": extract_images_ship_to_xts(customer_techpack_style_log_instance),
            "TECH_PACK_EXTRACTION": {
                "TechPackHeader": {
                    "**Customer": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_name,
                    "**StyleNo": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_no, # product => Product Name
                    "**StyleDescription": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_description, # product => Product Description
                    "**Season": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_season,
                    "**Status": techpack_status, # product => Product Status
                    "**ProductFamily": product_family, # product => SBU
                    "**ProductCategoryGroup": "",
                    "**ProductCategory": product_category, # product => Class
                    "**ProductType": "",
                    "**RepeatOrderSeason": "",
                    "**NewCarryOverRepeated": "",
                    "**Division": "",
                    "**Department": department,
                    "**ReferenceStyleNo": "",
                    "**PrimaryMaterial": "",
                    "**Vendor": vendor, # product => Parent Vendor
                    "**InDC": "",
                    "**Fit": "",
                    "**Wash": "",
                    "**Color": "",
                    "**Size": size, # product => Size Definitions
                    "**Brand": brand, # product => Brand
                    "Factory": factory, # product => Factory
                    "Sub Class": sub_class, # product => Sub Class
                    "Age": age, # product => Age
                    "Gender": gender, # product => Reportable Gender
                    "Season Name": season_name, # product => Season Name
                },
                "Table": self.extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema(customer_techpack_style_log_instance),
            },
            "DATE": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.timestamp_lf_captured,
        }

        logger.info("End transform_to_xts_schema_oa")
        return xts_data_schema

    def extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema(self, customer_techpack_style_log_instance):
        logger.info("Start extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema")
        result = []
        # OA customer does not have POM
        logger.info(f"Extracting POM OA")
        seq = 1
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.pom_unified:
            poms = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.pom_unified
            for pom in poms:
                header = pom['header']
                item = {
                    "Seq": seq,
                    "Type": "POM",
                    "Name": "",
                    "Header": {
                        "**ToleranceModel": header.get('tolerance_model', None),
                        "**PomDescription": header.get('pom_description', None),
                        "**GradingModel": header.get('grading_model', None),
                        "**GradingMethod": header.get('grading_method', None),
                        "**GradingUom": header.get('grading_uom', None),
                        "**BaseSize": header.get('base_size', None),
                        "**SizeRange": header.get('size_range', None)
                    },
                    "ColumnHeader": pom.get('column_header', None),
                    "ColumnMeasurementData": pom.get('column_measurement_data', None),
                    "ColumnGradingData": pom.get('column_grading_data', None)
                }
                result.append(item)
                seq = seq + 1
        # build bom unified
        # bom unified
        bom_unified = transform_bom_ai_to_bom_unified_for_oa(customer_techpack_style_log_instance.bom_ai)
        # MATERIAL_POSITION_HEADER = "Material Position"
        # BODY_HEADER = "Body"
        # MATERIAL_ATTRIBUTE_HEADER = "Material Attribute"
        # STITCH_TYPE_HEADER = "Stitch Type"  # No data
        # GAUGE_END_HEADER = "Gauge & End"
        # MATERIAL_STATUS_HEADER = "Material Status"
        # CUSTOM_COLORWAY_NAME_HEADER = "Custom Colorway Name"  # AVENUE WASH/LGH

        # SC_BODY_HEADER = "SC Body"
        # SC_BODY_DESCRIPTOR_HEADER = "SC Body Descriptor"
        # DESCRIPTION_HEADER = "Description"  # No data
        # COLOR_TYPE_HEADER = "Color Type"
        # HANG_FOLD_STATUS_HEADER = "Hang/Fold Status"
        bom_custom_mapping_columns = {
            "Material Position": "material_position",
            "Body": "body",
            "Material Attribute": "material_attribute",
            "Stitch Type": "stitch_type",
            "Gauge & End": "gauge_and_ends",
            "Material Status": "material_status",
            "Material Color": "custom_colorway_value",
            "Vendor": "vendor",

            "SC Body Descriptor": "sc_body_descriptor",
            "Description": "description_2nd",
            "Color Type": "color_type",
            "Hang/Fold Status": "hang_fold_status"
        }
        logger.info(f"Extracting BOM of OA")
        if bom_unified:
            for bom in bom_unified:
                column_header = [
                    "**BomHeader",
                    "**MaterialCategory",
                    "**MaterialCode",
                    "**MaterialType",
                    "**MaterialDescription",
                    "**Quantity",
                    "**MaterialContent",
                    "**MaterialConstruction",
                    "**MaterialCuttableWidth",
                    "**Placement",
                    "**Size",
                    "**RefNo",
                    "**Section",
                    "**InternalName",
                    "**SupplierName",
                    "**SupplierCop",
                    "**SupplierRefNo",
                    "**MainMaterial",
                    "**UOM",
                    "**CountryOfOrigin",
                    "**CostFob",
                    "**CostCif",
                    "**WeightBeforeWash",
                    "**WeightAfterWash",
                    "**WeightUOM",
                    "**Comments",
                ]
                
                # Define an array objects, each object has 2 properties to identify custom fields is available in bom unified or not
                bom_custom_fields = list(bom_custom_mapping_columns.keys())
                column_header.extend(bom_custom_fields)

                colorway_headers = []
                details = bom.get("details", [])
                if details is None:
                    details = []
                # custom field
                # for detail in details:
                #     # colorway header
                #     colorway = detail.get("colorway", [])
                #     if colorway is not None and len(colorway):
                #         for c in colorway:
                #             if "name" in c and c["name"] not in colorway_headers:
                #                 colorway_headers.append(c["name"])
                
                # if colorway_headers:
                #     # Add colorway headers to column header
                #     json_colorway_headers = {
                #         "Colorway" : colorway_headers
                #     }
                #     column_header.append(json_colorway_headers)

                item = {
                    "Seq": seq,
                    "Type": "BOM",
                    "Name": bom.get("part", ""),
                    "Header": {},
                    "ColumnHeader": column_header,
                    "Data": []
                }

                for detail in details:
                    data = [bom.get("part", "")]

                    data.extend([
                        detail.get("bom_detail_name", ""), #**MaterialCategory
                        detail.get("material_no", ""), #**MaterialCode
                        detail.get("material_type", ""), #**MaterialType
                        detail.get("material_name", ""), #**MaterialDescription
                        detail.get("qty", ""), #**Quantity
                        detail.get("material_content", ""), #**MaterialContent
                        "", # **MaterialConstruction
                        detail.get("material_cuttable_width", ""), # **MaterialCuttableWidth
                        detail.get("placement", ""), #**Placement
                        detail.get("size", ""), #**Size
                        detail.get("ref_no", ""), # **RefNo
                        "", # **Section
                        "", #**InternalName
                        detail.get("mill_supplier", ""), #**SupplierName
                        "", # **SupplierCop
                        detail.get("mil_suplier_article_no", ""), # **SupplierRefNo
                        detail.get("is_primary", ""), # **MainMaterial
                        "", # **UOM
                        detail.get("coo", ""), #Country of Origin (fiber)
                        "", # **CostFob
                        "", # **CostCif
                        detail.get("weight_before_wash", ""), # **WeightBeforeWash = Requested Weight Oz per Yard
                        detail.get("weight_after_wash", ""), # **WeightAfterWash
                        detail.get("weight_uom", ""), # **WeightUOM
                        detail.get("comment", ""), # **Comments = comment
                    ])

                    bom_data_custom_fields = []
                    if bom_custom_fields:
                        for custom_field in bom_custom_fields:
                            bom_data_custom_fields.append(detail.get(bom_custom_mapping_columns[custom_field], ""))

                    data.extend(bom_data_custom_fields)

                    logger.info(f"Extracting BOM Custom Fields End")

                    # if colorway_headers:
                    #     bom_data_colorway_fields = []
                    #     colorway = detail.get("colorway", [])
                    #     # logger.info(f"Extracting BOM Colorway Headers: {colorway_headers}")
                    #     # logger.info(f"Extracting BOM Colorway data: {colorway}")
                    #     for colorway_header in colorway_headers:
                    #         colorway_value = ""
                    #         if colorway is not None and len(colorway):
                    #             for c in colorway:
                    #                 # logger.info(f"Extracting BOM Colorway c: {c}")
                    #                 if "name" in c and c["name"] == colorway_header:
                    #                     colorway_value = c.get("value", "")
                    #                     # logger.info(f"Extracting BOM Colorway Value: {colorway_value}")
                    #                     break
                    #         bom_data_colorway_fields.append(colorway_value)
                    #     # Add colorway fields to bom data
                    #     json_bom_data_colorway_fields = {
                    #         "Colorway" : bom_data_colorway_fields
                    #     }
                    #     data.append(json_bom_data_colorway_fields)
                    item["Data"].append(data)

                seq += 1
                result.append(item)

        # colorway
        logger.info(f"Extracting Colorway")
        style_colorways = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.colorway
        if style_colorways:
            style_colorway_item = {
                "Seq": seq,
                "Type": "Colorway",
                "Header": {},
                "Name": "",
                "ColumnHeader": ["**ColorwayName", "**ColorwayCode", "**ColorwayImage", "Carry Over", "N / C / R - Colorway", "CAD Image Name", "Color Specification", "Garment Finish Comments", "Garment Chemical Finish", "Garment Mechanical Finish", "Garment Wash"],
                "Data": []
            }

            data_style_colorway = []
            for colorway in style_colorways:
                data_style_colorway.append([
                    colorway.get("name", ""), #**ColorwayName
                    colorway.get("color_no", ""), #**ColorwayCode
                    colorway.get("colorway_image", ""), #**ColorwayImage
                    colorway.get("carry_over", ""), #Carry Over
                    colorway.get("n_c_r_colorway", ""), #N / C / R - Colorway
                    colorway.get("cad_image_name", ""), #CAD Image Name
                    colorway.get("color_specification", ""), #Color Specification
                    colorway.get("garment_finish_comments", ""), #Garment Finish Comments
                    colorway.get("garment_chemical_finish", ""), #Garment Chemical Finish
                    colorway.get("garment_mechanical_finish", ""), #Garment Mechanical Finish
                    colorway.get("garment_wash", "") #Garment Wash
                ])
            style_colorway_item["Data"] = data_style_colorway
            result.append(style_colorway_item)

        # legacy style no
        logger.info(f"Extracting Legacy Style No")
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.legacy_style_no:
            item = {

                "Type": "Misc",
                "Header": {},
                "Name": "",
                "ColumnHeader": ["LegacyStyle"],
                "Data": [[customer_techpack_style_log_instance.legacy_style_no]]
            }

            result.append(item)
        logger.info(f"End extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema")
        return result

class WalmartXtsTransformationService:
    def __init__(self, current_user_session=None):
        self.current_user_session = current_user_session

    def transform_to_xts_schema_walmart(self, customer_techpack_style_log_instance):
        logger.info("Start transform_to_xts_schema_walmart")
        json_techpack_comparison_file = {
            "CONTAINER_NAME": "",
            "FILE_NAME": "",
            "STORAGE_NAME": ""
        }
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file and customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file.get("result", "") == "Success":
            json_techpack_comparison_file = {
                "CONTAINER_NAME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file.get("container_name", None),
                "FILE_NAME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file.get("file_name", None),
                "STORAGE_NAME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_comparison_file.get("storage_name", None)
            }
        
        attchment_pdf_techpack_json = {
            "TECH_PACK_FILE_CONTAINER_NAME": AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_TECHPACK_STYLE,
            "TECH_PACK_FILE_FILE_NAME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.attchment_pdf_techpack,
            "TECH_PACK_FILE_STORAGE_NAME": AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT
        }
        if TECHPACK_SOURCE_NON_PLM == customer_techpack_style_log_instance.techpack_source:
            attchment_pdf_techpack_json = {
                "TECH_PACK_FILE_CONTAINER_NAME": AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_TECHPACK_NONPLM,
                "TECH_PACK_FILE_FILE_NAME": f"{AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_TECHPACK_NONPLM_PROCESSED_PDF}{customer_techpack_style_log_instance.attchment_pdf_techpack}",
                "TECH_PACK_FILE_STORAGE_NAME": AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT
            }
        
        # Extract data from custom_fields
        custom_fields_extraction = None
        xts_techpack_extraction = None
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.custom_fields:
            custom_fields_extraction = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.custom_fields.get("xts_data", None)
        if custom_fields_extraction:
            xts_techpack_extraction = custom_fields_extraction.get("TECH_PACK_EXTRACTION", None)
        
        # Fallback to manual extraction if no custom_fields data available
        if not xts_techpack_extraction:
            xts_techpack_extraction = {
                "TechPackHeader": {
                    "**Customer": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_name,
                    "**StyleNo": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_no,
                    "**StyleDescription": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_description,
                    "**Season": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_season,
                    "**Status": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_techpack_status,
                    "**ProductCategoryGroup": None,
                    "**ProductCategory": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.product_category,
                    "**ProductType": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_product_type,
                    "**RepeatOrderSeason": None,
                    "**NewCarryOverRepeated": None,
                    "**Department": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_department,
                    "**ReferenceStyleNo": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.reference_style_no,
                    "**PrimaryMaterial": None,
                    "**Vendor": None,
                    "**InDC": None,
                    "**Fit": None,
                    "**Wash": None,
                    "**Color": None,
                    "**Size": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.size,
                    "**Brand": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_brand,
                    "**Division": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_division
                },
                "Table": self.extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema(customer_techpack_style_log_instance),
            }
        
        xts_data_schema = None
        xts_data_schema = {
                "ACTION_CODE": "NEW_TECHPACK",
                "CUSTOMER": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_name,
                "DATE": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.timestamp_lf_captured,
                "DEPARTMENT": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_department,
                "PRODUCT_TYPE": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_product_type,
                "SEASON": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_season,
                "STYLE_DESCRIPTION": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_description,
                "STYLE_NO": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.style_no,
                "TECH_PACK_COMPARISON_FILE": json_techpack_comparison_file,
                "TECH_PACK_EXTRACTION": xts_techpack_extraction,
                "TECH_PACK_DOWNLOAD_TIME": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.timestamp_lf_captured,
                "TECH_PACK_FILE": attchment_pdf_techpack_json,
                "TECH_PACK_IMAGES": extract_images_ship_to_xts(customer_techpack_style_log_instance),
                "TECH_PACK_STATUS": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.customer_techpack_status,
                "TP_MGMT_RECORD_ID": customer_techpack_style_log_instance.teckpack_style_log_id
            }

        logger.info("End transform_to_xts_schema_walmart")
        return xts_data_schema

    def extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema(self, customer_techpack_style_log_instance):
        logger.info("Start extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema")
        result = []
        logger.info(f"Extracting POM")
        seq = 1
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.pom_unified:
            poms = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.pom_unified
            for pom in poms:
                header = pom['header']
                item = {
                    "Seq": seq,
                    "Type": "POM",
                    "Name": "",
                    "Header": {
                        "**ToleranceModel": header.get('tolerance_model', None),
                        "**PomDescription": header.get('pom_description', None),
                        "**GradingModel": header.get('grading_model', None),
                        "**GradingMethod": header.get('grading_method', None),
                        "**GradingUom": header.get('grading_uom', None),
                        "**BaseSize": header.get('base_size', None),
                        "**SizeRange": header.get('size_range', None),
                        "Block": header.get('block', None)
                    },
                    "ColumnHeader": pom.get('column_header', None),
                    "ColumnMeasurementData": pom.get('column_measurement_data', None),
                    "ColumnGradingData": pom.get('column_grading_data', None)
                }
                result.append(item)
                seq = seq + 1
        # bom unified
        logger.info(f"Extracting BOM")
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.bom_unified:
            boms = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.bom_unified
            for bom in boms:
                column_header = [
                    "**BomHeader",
                    "**MaterialCategory",
                    "**MaterialCode",
                    "**MaterialType",
                    "**MaterialDescription",
                    "**Quantity",
                    "**MaterialContent",
                    "**MaterialConstruction",
                    "**MaterialCuttableWidth",
                    "**Placement",
                    "**Size",
                    "**RefNo",
                    "**Section",
                    "**InternalName",
                    "**SupplierName",
                    "**SupplierCop",
                    "**SupplierRefNo",
                    "**MainMaterial",
                    "**UOM",
                    "**CountryOfOrigin",
                    "**CostFob",
                    "**CostCif",
                    "**WeightBeforeWash",
                    "**WeightAfterWash",
                    "**WeightUOM",
                    "**Comments"
                ]
                # Define an array objects, each object has 2 properties to identify custom fields is available in bom unified or not
                bom_custom_fields = []
                colorway_headers = []
                details = bom.get("details", [])
                if details is None:
                    details = []
                # custom field
                for detail in details:
                    # Component
                    component = detail.get("component", "")
                    if component is not None and component != "" and "Component" not in bom_custom_fields:
                        bom_custom_fields.append("Component")
                    
                    #Finished Construction
                    finished_construction = detail.get("finished_construction", "")
                    if finished_construction is not None and finished_construction != "" and "FinishedConstruction" not in bom_custom_fields:
                        bom_custom_fields.append("FinishedConstruction")
                    
                    #Special Care/Other Notes
                    special_care_or_other_notes = detail.get("special_care_or_other_notes", "")
                    if special_care_or_other_notes is not None and special_care_or_other_notes != "" and "SpecialCareOrOtherNotes" not in bom_custom_fields:
                        bom_custom_fields.append("SpecialCareOrOtherNotes")
                    
                    #Material Sub Type
                    material_sub_type = detail.get("material_sub_type", "")
                    if material_sub_type is not None and material_sub_type != "" and "material_sub_type" not in bom_custom_fields:
                        bom_custom_fields.append("material_sub_type")
                    
                    # status
                    status = detail.get("status", "")
                    if status is not None and status != "" and "status" not in bom_custom_fields:
                        bom_custom_fields.append("status")
                    
                    colorway = detail.get("colorway", [])
                    if colorway is not None and len(colorway):
                        for c in colorway:
                            if "name" in c and c["name"] not in colorway_headers:
                                colorway_headers.append(c["name"])
                
                if bom_custom_fields:
                    column_header.extend(bom_custom_fields)
                if colorway_headers:
                    # Add colorway headers to column header
                    json_colorway_headers = {
                        "Colorway" : colorway_headers
                    }
                    column_header.append(json_colorway_headers)

                item = {
                    "Seq": seq,
                    "Type": "BOM",
                    "Name": bom.get("part", ""),
                    "Header": {},
                    "ColumnHeader": column_header,
                    "Data": []
                }

                for detail in details:
                    data = [bom.get("part", "")]
                    compositions = []
                    origin_ctr = ""
                    bom_compositions = detail.get("composition", [])
                    if bom_compositions:
                        for composition in bom_compositions:
                            percentage = composition.get("fiber_pecentage", "")
                            content = composition.get("fiber_content", "")
                            if percentage and content:
                                compositions.append(f"{percentage}% {content}")

                        origin_ctr = bom_compositions[0].get("fiber_coo", "")

                    data.extend([
                        detail.get("bom_detail_name", ""),
                        detail.get("material_no", ""),
                        detail.get("material_type", ""),
                        detail.get("material_name", ""),
                        detail.get("qty", ""),
                        " ".join(compositions),
                        "", # **MaterialConstruction
                        "", # **MaterialCuttableWidth
                        detail.get("placement", ""),
                        detail.get("size", ""),
                        "", # **RefNo
                        "", # **Section
                        detail.get("material_name", ""),
                        detail.get("mill_supplier", ""),
                        "", # **SupplierCop
                        detail.get("mil_suplier_article_no", ""), # **SupplierRefNo
                        detail.get("primary", ""), # **MainMaterial
                        "", # **UOM
                        origin_ctr,
                        "", # **CostFob
                        "", # **CostCif
                        detail.get("weight_before_wash", ""), # **WeightBeforeWash
                        detail.get("weight_after_wash", ""), # **WeightAfterWash
                        detail.get("weight_uom", ""), # **WeightUOM
                        "", # **Comments
                    ])

                    bom_data_custom_fields = []
                    if bom_custom_fields:
                        for custom_field in bom_custom_fields:
                            # Component
                            if custom_field == "Component":
                                bom_data_custom_fields.append(detail.get("component", ""))
                            elif custom_field == "FinishedConstruction":
                                bom_data_custom_fields.append(detail.get("finished_construction", ""))
                            elif custom_field == "SpecialCareOrOtherNotes":
                                bom_data_custom_fields.append(detail.get("special_care_or_other_notes", ""))
                            else:
                                bom_data_custom_fields.append(detail.get(custom_field, ""))
                        
                    data.extend(bom_data_custom_fields)

                    if colorway_headers:
                        bom_data_colorway_fields = []
                        colorway = detail.get("colorway", [])
                        for colorway_header in colorway_headers:
                            colorway_value = ""
                            if colorway is not None and len(colorway):
                                for c in colorway:
                                    if "name" in c and c["name"] == colorway_header:
                                        colorway_value = c.get("value", "")
                                        break
                            bom_data_colorway_fields.append(colorway_value)
                        # Add colorway fields to bom data
                        json_bom_data_colorway_fields = {
                            "Colorway" : bom_data_colorway_fields
                        }
                        data.append(json_bom_data_colorway_fields)
                    item["Data"].append(data)

                seq += 1
                result.append(item)

        # colorway
        logger.info(f"Extracting Colorway")
        style_colorways = customer_techpack_style_log_instance.colorway
        if style_colorways:
            style_colorway_item = {
                "Seq": seq,
                "Type": "Colorway",
                "Header": {},
                "Name": "",
                "ColumnHeader": ["**ColorwayName", "**ColorwayCode", "**ColorwayImage"],
                "Data": []
            }

            data_style_colorway = []
            for colorway in style_colorways:
                data_style_colorway.append([
                    colorway.get("name", ""),
                    colorway.get("colorway", ""),
                    None
                ])
            style_colorway_item["Data"] = data_style_colorway
            result.append(style_colorway_item)
            seq += 1

        # legacy style no
        logger.info(f"Extracting Legacy Style No")
        if customer_techpack_style_log_instance.legacy_style_no:
            item = {
                "Seq": seq,
                "Type": "Misc",
                "Header": {},
                "Name": "",
                "ColumnHeader": ["LegacyStyle"],
                "Data": [[customer_techpack_style_log_instance.legacy_style_no]]
            }

            result.append(item)
        logger.info(f"End extract_techpack_data_follow_xts_schema")
        return result

def clean_text_for_embedding(input_text):
    """
    Clean text by removing special characters while preserving semantic meaning for embedding.
    Keeps percentages, numbers, and alphanumeric content.
    
    Args:
        input_text (str): Raw fabric description text
        
    Returns:
        str: Cleaned text suitable for embedding
        
    Example:
        Input: "31961-31961 AUSTIN (AUGUSTANA) 1X1 RIB + SPX 360G GOLDTEX - / 98% COTTON / 2% ELASTANE/CHINA"
        Output: "31961-31961 AUSTIN AUGUSTANA 1X1 RIB SPX 360G GOLDTEX 98% COTTON 2% ELASTANE CHINA"
    """
    if not input_text or not isinstance(input_text, str):
        return ""
    
    # Remove problematic punctuation but keep percentages intact
    cleaned = re.sub(r'[()]+', ' ', input_text)  # Remove parentheses
    cleaned = re.sub(r'\s*[/+\-]\s*', ' ', cleaned)  # Replace separators with spaces
    cleaned = re.sub(r'[^\w\s%]', ' ', cleaned)  # Remove other special chars except % and alphanumeric
    cleaned = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', cleaned)  # Normalize whitespace
    cleaned = cleaned.strip()
    
    return cleaned

def validate_and_loads_json(data):
    """
    Safely parse JSON with comprehensive validation
    
    Returns: (success: bool, result: dict/list/None, error: str/None)
    """
    # Type check
    if data is None:
        return None
    
    if isinstance(data, (dict, list)):
        return data
    
    if not isinstance(data, str):
        logger.error(f"Invalid data type for JSON parsing: {type(data)}")
        return None
    
    # Empty check
    data = data.strip()
    if not data:
        logger.error("Empty JSON string")
        return None
    
    # Basic syntax check (optional)
    if not (data.startswith(('{', '[')) and data.endswith(('}', ']'))):
        logger.error("Invalid JSON format: does not start/end with expected characters")
        return data
    
    # Parse
    try:
        result = json.loads(data)
        return result
    except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
        error_msg = f"JSONDecodeError: {e.msg} at position {e.pos}"
        logger.error(error_msg)
        logger.error(f"Context: ...{data[max(0, e.pos-30):e.pos+30]}...")
        return None

utils/CommonUtil.py::get_filename_prefix.name: get_filename_prefix
utils/CommonUtil.py::get_filename_prefix.source_code:
def get_filename_prefix(filename: str, max_length: int = 255) -> str:
    """
    Sanitize filename to be safe for filesystem
    
    Args:
        filename: Original filename
        max_length: Maximum filename length (default 255)
    
    Returns:
        Safe filename string
    """
    # Remove or replace unsafe characters
    # Keep only: letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, underscores, dots
    safe_filename = re.sub(r'[<>:"/\\|?*]', '_', filename)
    
    # Replace multiple consecutive underscores/spaces with single underscore
    safe_filename = re.sub(r'[_\s]+', '_', safe_filename)
    
    # Remove leading/trailing underscores and dots
    safe_filename = safe_filename.strip('_. ')
    
    # Ensure it's not empty
    if not safe_filename:
        safe_filename = "unnamed_file"
    
    # Truncate if too long (keep extension)
    if len(safe_filename) > max_length:
        name, ext = os.path.splitext(safe_filename)
        safe_filename = name[:max_length-len(ext)] + ext
    
    return safe_filename

utils/CostingUtil.py::get_techpack_file_.source_code:
def get_techpack_file_path(file_name_str, is_non_plm, included_filesource = True):
    file_source = AZURE_STORAGE_HOST if included_filesource else ""

    if is_non_plm:
        file_location = AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_NONPLM_PROCESSED_PDF if re.search(r"\.pdf+$", file_name_str) else AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_NONPLM_PROCESSED_IMAGES
        file_source = file_source + file_location + "/"
    else:
        file_source = file_source + f'{AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_TECHPACK_STYLE}/'

    file_name_str = re.sub(r'\[|\]|\{|\}|"|path|:', "", file_name_str)
    file_names = file_name_str.split(",")

    list_file = []
    for file_name in file_names:
        file_path = f"{file_source}{file_name}"
        list_file.append(file_path)

    return list_file

def transform_bom_ai_to_bom_unified_for_oa(data: dict):
    """
    Transform BOM AI to BOM Unified for OA customer
    """
    # bom unified
    bom_unified = [{
        'part': 'BOM',
        'details': []
    }]
    bom_details = []
    for bom_item in data['bom']:
        for k, v in bom_item.items():
            for item in v:
                bom_details.append({
                    'bom_detail_name': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(k and str(k).strip() or 'Fabric'),
                    "material_no": normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('material', '') or ''),
                    "material_type": normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('material_type', '') or ''),
                    "material_name": normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('description', '') or ''),
                    'placement': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('placement', '') or ''),
                    'usage': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('placement', '') or ''),
                    'mill_supplier': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('supplier', '') or ''),
                    'colorway': [{
                        'name': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('custom_colorway_name', '') or ''),
                        'value': '',
                        'detail': None,
                    }],
                    'ref_no': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('ref_no', '') or ''),
                    'is_primary': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('is_primary', '') or ''),
                    'coo': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('coo', '') or ''),
                    'material_position': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('material_position', '') or ''),
                    'body': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('body', '') or ''),
                    'material_attribute': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('material_attribute', '') or ''),
                    'stitch_type': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('stitch_type', '') or ''),
                    'gauge_and_ends': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('gauge_and_ends', '') or ''),
                    'material_status': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('material_status', '') or ''),
                    'custom_colorway_name': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('custom_colorway_name', '') or ''),
                    'custom_colorway_value': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('custom_colorway_value', '') or ''),
                    'vendor': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('vendor', '') or ''),
                    'design_destriction': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('restriction', '') or ''),
                    'sc_body': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('sc_body', '') or ''),
                    'sc_body_descriptor': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('sc_body_descriptor', '') or ''),
                    'description_2nd': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('description_2nd', '') or ''),
                    'color_type': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('color_type', '') or ''),
                    'hang_fold_status': normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(item and item.get('hang_fold_status', '') or '')
                })
    bom_unified[0]['details'] = bom_details
    return bom_unified

utils/TransformDataUtil.py::normalize_te.name: normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak
utils/TransformDataUtil.py::normalize_te.source_code:
def normalize_text_and_remove_linebreak(text: str) -> str:
        """Comprehensive ligature normalization for excel extraction"""
        if not text:
            return ""
        
        # MOST COMMON LIGATURES (covers 99% of cases)
        ligature_map = {
            # Basic Latin ligatures
            'ﬁ': 'fi',    # U+FB01 - LATIN SMALL LIGATURE FI
            'ﬂ': 'fl',    # U+FB02 - LATIN SMALL LIGATURE FL
            'ﬀ': 'ff',    # U+FB00 - LATIN SMALL LIGATURE FF
            'ﬃ': 'ffi',   # U+FB03 - LATIN SMALL LIGATURE FFI
            'ﬄ': 'ffl',   # U+FB04 - LATIN SMALL LIGATURE FFL
            'ﬆ': 'st',    # U+FB06 - LATIN SMALL LIGATURE ST
            
            # Less common but still found
            'ĳ': 'ij',    # U+0133 - LATIN SMALL LIGATURE IJ
            'Ĳ': 'IJ',    # U+0132 - LATIN CAPITAL LIGATURE IJ
            'œ': 'oe',    # U+0153 - LATIN SMALL LIGATURE OE
            'Œ': 'OE',    # U+0152 - LATIN CAPITAL LIGATURE OE
            'æ': 'ae',    # U+00E6 - LATIN SMALL LIGATURE AE
            'Æ': 'AE',    # U+00C6 - LATIN CAPITAL LIGATURE AE
            
            # Spaces and invisible characters
            '\u00a0': ' ',  # U+00A0 - NON-BREAKING SPACE
            '\u2009': ' ',  # U+2009 - THIN SPACE
            '\u200a': ' ',  # U+200A - HAIR SPACE
            '\u2002': ' ',  # U+2002 - EN SPACE
            '\u2003': ' ',  # U+2003 - EM SPACE
            '\u2004': ' ',  # U+2004 - THREE-PER-EM SPACE
            '\u2005': ' ',  # U+2005 - FOUR-PER-EM SPACE
            '\u2006': ' ',  # U+2006 - SIX-PER-EM SPACE
            '\u2007': ' ',  # U+2007 - FIGURE SPACE
            '\u2008': ' ',  # U+2008 - PUNCTUATION SPACE
            '\u200b': '',   # U+200B - ZERO WIDTH SPACE
            '\ufeff': '',   # U+FEFF - ZERO WIDTH NO-BREAK SPACE (BOM)
        }
        
        # Apply all mappings
        normalized = text
        for strange_char, normal_char in ligature_map.items():
            normalized = normalized.replace(strange_char, normal_char)
        
        # Clean up whitespace and newlines
        normalized = normalized.replace('\n', ' ').strip()
        
        # Remove extra spaces
        normalized = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', normalized)
        
        # Remove new line \n
        normalized = normalized.replace('\n', ' ')

        return normalized
utils/TransformDataUtil.py::normalize_te.docstring: Comprehensive ligature normalization for excel extraction

utils/traceability_decorator.py::trace.name: trace
utils/traceability_decorator.py::trace.source_code:
def trace(log_action_type: str, log_action_party: str, function_group: str, 
          function_name: Optional[str] = None):
    """
    Decorator to automatically log function calls
    
    Args:
        function_group: Category (e.g., "Techpack-Ingestion", "Techpack-Extraction")
        function_name: Override function name (defaults to actual function name)
    """
    def decorator(func: Callable) -> Callable:
        @functools.wraps(func)
        def wrapper(*args, **kwargs):
            actual_function_name = function_name or func.__name__
            
            # Trace request asynchronously (fire and forget)
            traceability_service.async_trace(
                function_group=function_group,
                function_name=actual_function_name,
                log_action_type=log_action_type,
                log_action_party=log_action_party
            )

            # Execute the main function            
            return func(*args, **kwargs)
        return wrapper
    return decorator
